# Kathirvel S — Software Developer Portfolio

> This file provides context about this website for Large Language Models (LLMs) and AI assistants.

## About the Owner

**Name:** Kathirvel S
**Title:** Software Developer
**Location:** Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India
**Primary Website:** https://skathir45.netlify.app
**Current Status:** B.E. EEE Student at Panimalar Engineering College (2023–2027)

## Core Specialization

Kathirvel S is a **Software Developer** specializing in:

1. **MERN Stack** — MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js
2. **React Native** — Cross-platform mobile app development with Expo
3. **Next.js** — Server-side rendering and full-stack React applications
4. **UI/UX Design** — User-centered interface design
5. **AI-Assisted Development** — Leveraging AI tools for productivity

## Professional Experience

### Full-Stack Developer Intern — Silver Pearl Innovation
**Duration:** February 2025 – August 2025 | Chennai
- Developed and optimized full-stack web applications
- Tech Stack: React.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, Bootstrap
- Automated manual processes and improved system performance

## Education

### Panimalar Engineering College, Chennai
**Degree:** B.E. Electrical and Electronics Engineering (Jun 2023 – Mar 2027)

### Government Boys Higher Secondary School
**Stream:** Bio-Maths (Mar 2015 – May 2023)

## Technical Skills

- **Mobile:** React Native, Expo

2. **AI Diet Planner** — React Native meal planning app with nutritional tracking

4. **Offline PKI Encryption** — SIH 2024 Runner-up
